title: SuperHeroes: Villains!
description: A modpack about villains, fantasy and powerups!
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a41a6452a4ffdcde6993002122feec0107195e.png)

This modpack centers around a villains-themed experience, featuring content inspired by iconic heroes as well as original ideas.

Progression plays a key role, with players unlocking powers, crafting suits and equipment, and taking on increasingly challenging enemies.
